title: 日本ダービーにむけて

text_block_list.text: It's the day of the Japanese Derby.

The anticipation from the stands for the
showdown between the three members of BNW is
so strong, it's practically palpable from the
waiting room.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Everyone used to freak out about the "top two"
but now it's all about BNW...
choice_data_list: People are finally taking you seriously.
People are finally taking you seriously.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Pfft. Are they? The Triple Crown is three races,
and the Satsuki Sho's the only one done.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
They may be singing about me now, but public
opinion can change in the blink of an eye.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
If I get ahead of myself, there's no way I'm going
to win against her.

There's no doubt who Narita Taishin is talking
about.

Winning Ticket—the one who's been utterly
obsessed with becoming a Derby champion.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
My goal hasn't changed. I'm gonna win and show
the world what I'm made of.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Until then, I can't let my guard down.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Well, here I go.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Hello, Taishin.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hayahide. Where is she?

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Not here yet. I think she's planning to stay in the
waiting room until right before the start of the
race.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Have you noticed how for these past few days
she...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
Hasn't been talking to us? Yeah. She's probably
doing that to stay focused.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: Heh. You really do pay attention to everything.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
It's just easy to notice when someone as unhinged
as her suddenly goes dead quiet.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: But it doesn't matter. I'm going to win.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I could say the same to you.

Thus begins the Classic Triple Crown's second
race, the Japanese Derby—and the showdown
between the top three!
